features: The Moon with procedural craters and orbit
Mouse drag interaction for manual rotation
New life emerges on the equator
Dynamic weather effects: moving cloud layer

changes: Created Earth sphere with procedural texture
Added all 7 continents
Added starfield background (800 stars)
Implemented ambient and directional lighting
Applied 23.5° axial tilt
Added camera drift animation
Added atmospheric glow sphere (backside rendering)
Implemented procedural cloud layer with canvas blobs
Clouds rotate at different speed for realism
Enhanced texture with improved continent shapes
Better specular highlights on oceans
Added procedural Moon with cratered canvas texture and realistic orbit
Added distant glowing Sun sphere as light source visualization
Implemented mouse drag controls to manually rotate Earth
Latitude-based biome tinting on texture
Additional islands and refined continental coastlines
Added tropical flora around the equator for ecological variety
Enhanced the Earth aesthetic with the emergence of vibrant life
Added simple weather effects to represent rainfall over regions
Implemented a lighting model with ambient and directional lights
Enhanced cloud layer with dynamic, moving patterns for realism
Implemented interactive seasonal changes affecting color of biomes
Biomes now change colors with the seasons
